description_long: This is a life-sized donkey with a robust, stocky build and a slightly arched back. Its coat is a muted brownish-gray with a rough, textured surface, and it features a short, upright mane running along the neck. The donkey's head is large and expressive, with long, upright ears that are slightly darker at the tips and a lighter muzzle. Its legs are sturdy and end in well-defined, light-colored hooves. The tail is moderately long, tapering to a dark tuft at the end, and the overall appearance is realistic, capturing the typical features of a donkey found in urban or rural environments.
description: A realistic, brownish-gray donkey with a textured coat, upright ears, and a tufted tail, standing on four sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the donkey's back, tail with a dark tuft, and the right side of its body and head.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the donkey's face, upright ears, and the symmetry of its head and front legs.
description_view_2: Front-side view displaying the donkey's head, both ears, and the full length of its body and legs.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the donkey's back, tail, and hind legs, with the ears visible from behind.
attribute_ears: The donkey's ears are long, upright, and slightly pointed, positioned symmetrically on top of the head. They are thick at the base, tapering to a rounded tip, with a darker coloration at the tips and a textured surface that matches the rest of the coat.
attribute_tail: The tail is moderately long and slender, extending straight from the base of the spine and ending in a distinct, dark tuft. The tail is slightly textured and matches the body color except for the darker tuft at the end.
attribute_hooves: There are four visible hooves, each compact and rounded with a light grayish-white color. The hooves are well-defined and slightly textured, with no visible markings.
attribute_mane: The mane is short, upright, and runs along the top of the neck. It is dark in color, coarse in texture, and appears to be slightly raised from the neck, giving a bristly appearance.
attribute_facial_markings: A light-colored marking is visible around the muzzle and above the nostrils, contrasting with the darker brown-gray of the rest of the face.
